title: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Illinois Tool Works (ITW) have what it takes?

title: Share Price Decline Has Illinois Tool Works Looking Reasonable
text: Illinois Tool Works is a Dividend Champion with 59 consecutive years of dividend growth. Shares currently yield 2.74%. Illinois Tool Works is an industrial behemoth that has been able to get stronger since the onset of the pandemic.

title: Illinois Tool Works - An Attractively Valued Dividend Aristocrat
text: This market is merciless as we're looking at one of the fasted compressions in valuation in modern history. While it's hard to call for a bottom, the market is oversold, which means dividend growth investors are looking at new opportunities.

title: 7 ‘Strong Buy' Dividend Kings to Own Now If the Fed Rate Increase This Week Is Huge
text: One thing has become painfully obvious, after Friday's consumer price index reading came in at a scorching 8.6% year over year, the highest reading since 1981.

title: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Down 3.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
